creator: ryanrfrederick@gmail.com
text:
devel/p5-ReadLine-TTYtter fails to install on FreeBSD 10 with the following error:

===>  Installing for p5-ReadLine-TTYtter-1.4
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/p5-ReadLine-TTYtter already installed
===>   Registering installation for p5-ReadLine-TTYtter-1.4 as automatic
Installing p5-ReadLine-TTYtter-1.4...pkg-static: p5-ReadLine-TTYtter-1.4 conflicts with p5-ReadLine-Perl-1.0303_1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/Term/ReadLine/.packlist
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/p5-ReadLine-TTYtter
